name: Elegant Wedding Luxe
description: Full-service, high-end decoration package for grand wedding ceremonies and receptions. Includes floral walls, premium lighting & others.

name: In-Studio Consultation (Home)
description: One-hour private consultation at our studio to plan and design a single room or area in your home. Perfect for initial conceptualization.

name: Birthday Bash Basic
description: A fun and lively package for small to medium-sized birthday parties. Includes balloon arches, themed table settings, and basic mood lighting.
